nasb.text: When He spread it out before me, it was written on the front and back, and written on it were lamentations, mourning and woe.

esv.text: And he spread it before me. And it had writing on the front and on the back, and there were written on it words of lamentation and mourning and woe.

cnv.text: 他把書卷在我面前展開，書卷內外都寫上字，寫的是哀歌、悲歎和災禍。

ccb.text: 那只手把那书卷打开，书卷的两面都写满了哀伤、叹息、悲痛的话。
